mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SCOTT.post_bookmarks (account_id, post_id) VALUES (#{accountId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{postId, jdbcType=NUMERIC})
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT inner_q.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY inner_q.bookmarkedAt DESC) AS rn FROM ( SELECT v.post_id AS postId, v.nickname AS writerDisplayName, v.handle AS writerHandle, v.profile_image_url AS writerProfileImageUrl, v.hati_code AS writerHatiCode, v.account_id AS writerAccountId, up.gender AS writerGender, TO_CHAR(v.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdAtStr, v.content AS content, v.like_count AS likeCount, v.comment_count AS commentCount, v.view_count AS viewCount,
1 AS bookmarked,
CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM SCOTT.post_like pl WHERE pl.post_id = v.post_id AND pl.account_id = #{accountId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS liked,
0 AS pinned,
pb.created_at AS bookmarkedAt
FROM SCOTT.post_bookmarks pb JOIN SCOTT.vw_posts_with_counts v ON v.post_id = pb.post_id LEFT JOIN SCOTT.user_profile up ON up.account_id = v.account_id WHERE pb.account_id = #{accountId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
AND ( v.content LIKE '%' || #{q} || '%' OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM SCOTT.tag_links tl JOIN SCOTT.tags t ON t.tag_id = tl.tag_id WHERE tl.post_id = v.post_id AND t.tag_text LIKE '%' || REPLACE(#{q}, '#', '') || '%' ) OR v.nickname LIKE '%' || #{q} || '%' OR v.handle LIKE '%' || REPLACE(#{q}, '@', '') || '%' OR ( REPLACE(v.nickname, ' ', '') || '@' || REPLACE(REPLACE(v.handle, '@', ''), ' ', '') ) LIKE '%' || REPLACE(REPLACE(#{q}, ' ', ''), '@@', '@') || '%' )
) inner_q ) WHERE rn BETWEEN (#{offset, jdbcType=NUMERIC} + 1) AND (#{offset, jdbcType=NUMERIC} + #{limit, jdbcType=NUMERIC}) ORDER BY rn
